title: Senior Software Engineer - Dell India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Dell India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Dell India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Kochi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Dell India:
Dell India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dell India!
